generated_for: TOEIC Part 1 generated image quality replacement

replacements.title: Print Production Area
replacements.reason: Visible watermark/fake logo artifact in the lower-right corner.
replacements.prompt_addendum: Show a commercial print operator inspecting blank proof sheets under a desk lamp. Keep all documents blank or softly blurred. No black cinematic borders.

replacements.title: Hotel Event Desk
replacements.reason: Visible TOEIC text artifact in the lower-right corner.
replacements.prompt_addendum: Show a calm hotel conference registration desk with one coordinator checking a guest list on a tablet and plain blank folded badges or brochures on the table. Do not include digital wall screens, posters, masks, stacked boxes, readable cards, or printed logos.

replacements.title: Hotel Event Desk
replacements.reason: Badge/name-card area contains repeated pseudo-logo artifacts.
replacements.prompt_addendum: Show a hotel event registration desk with blank folded table cards and blank badges only. Avoid close-up logo-like badge faces, printed marks, digital screens, posters, masks, or readable paper text.

replacements.title: Print Production Area
replacements.reason: Large generated caption/subtitle text is burned into the photo.
replacements.prompt_addendum: Show a commercial print operator inspecting one large blank white proof sheet under a desk lamp. The sheet must have no printed words, no marks, no diagrams, and no visible writing. The image must fill the entire 16:9 frame edge to edge with no letterbox bars, no black borders, no cinematic crop, no subtitles, no captions, and no lower-third text.

replacements.title: Print Production Area
replacements.reason: Paper/poster area contains too many readable-text-like artifacts.
replacements.prompt_addendum: Show a commercial print operator inspecting one large blank white proof sheet under a desk lamp in a print room. The sheet must have no printed words, no marks, no diagrams, and no visible writing. The image must fill the entire 16:9 frame edge to edge with no letterbox bars, no black borders, no cinematic crop, and no text anywhere in the photo.

replacements.title: Warehouse Quality Inspection
replacements.reason: Carton labels are too close to readable pseudo-brand text.
replacements.prompt_addendum: Use plain warehouse cartons with blank or blurred labels. The supervisor may scan a barcode-like blank label, but no readable words, product names, or brand-like marks.

replacements.title: Print Production Area
replacements.reason: Visible stock-style watermark/logo artifact in the lower-right corner.
replacements.prompt_addendum: Show a commercial print operator inspecting blank proof sheets under a desk lamp. No watermark, no logo, no signature, no black cinematic borders.
